theme_archetype.vibe: Twilight kingdom at the edge of an enchanted forest. High-end, mystical, regal, and deep.
theme_archetype.theme: Dark Theme (with high-contrast parchment light panels)

usage.h1_title: font-heading font-bold text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight text-amber_glow drop-shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(242,213,126,0.3)]
usage.h3_widget: font-heading font-semibold text-xl md:text-2xl uppercase tracking-[0.1em]

global.container: w-full h-full min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-twilight_deep overflow-hidden touch-none select-none
global.game_window: relative w-full max-w-[1280px] aspect-[16/10] md:max-h-[800px] bg-black shadow-2xl overflow-hidden

hud.top_bar: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-16 flex justify-between items-center px-6 z-20 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/80 to-transparent
hud.bottom_nav: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-20 flex justify-center items-center gap-4 px-6 z-20 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/60 to-transparent

buttons.primary_regal: relative group px-8 py-3 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-amber_glow to-bronze_trim text-on_parchment border-2 border-amber_glow/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(242,213,126,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(242,213,126,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 overflow-hidden
buttons.primary_regal_inner: absolute inset-0 bg-white/20 translate-y-full group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300 rounded-full
buttons.secondary_dark: px-6 py-2 rounded-full bg-glass_dark backdrop-blur-md border border-bronze_trim/50 text-amber_glow hover:bg-bronze_trim/20 transition-all duration-300
buttons.nav_pill: px-4 py-2 rounded-xl bg-black/50 border border-white/10 text-on_dark_muted hover:text-white hover:border-amber_glow/50 transition-colors

panels.parchment_card: relative rounded-lg bg-parchment_base text-on_parchment border-[6px] border-bronze_trim shadow-[inset_0_0_40px_rgba(140,94,53,0.3),0_10px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-6 overflow-hidden
panels.glass_hud_panel: rounded-xl bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-lg border border-bronze_trim/40 shadow-[0_4px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] p-4 text-on_dark

board.container: relative grid grid-cols-8 grid-rows-8 gap-1 p-2 bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-md border-[4px] border-bronze_trim rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(123,66,246,0.2),inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
board.cell_bg: w-full h-full rounded-md bg-white/5 border border-white/5 shadow-inner

gem_specs.rules: Pure CSS/SVG. No images. Must be visually distinct for color-blind accessibility.

topaz.css: rotate-45 bg-gradient-to-tr from-yellow-200 via-amber-500 to-amber-800 shadow-[inset_0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)] rounded-sm
topaz.wrapper_note: Apply rotation to inner element, keep wrapper straight for grid

animations.swap: { layout: true, transition: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 300, damping: 25 } }
animations.pop: { initial: { scale: 1, filter: 'brightness(1)' }, animate: { scale: 1.3, opacity: 0, filter: 'brightness(2)' }, transition: { duration: 0.2 } }
animations.falling: { initial: { y: -50, opacity: 0 }, animate: { y: 0, opacity: 1 }, transition: { type: 'spring', bounce: 0.4 } }
animations.sparkle: { initial: { scale: 0, rotate: -45 }, animate: { scale: [0, 1.2, 0], rotate: 45 }, transition: { duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeInOut' } }

title_screen.background: main_background image filling the game window
elements: Massive Logo H1 with text shadow (Match Majesty)
Mascot placeholder image floating right side
Vertical stack of Primary Regal buttons: Play, Continue, Settings

gameplay_screen.top_bar: Resource counters (Stardust, Stone, Wood, Cloth, Gold) in glass panels
gameplay_screen.right_panel: Objective glass panel. 4-6 target gems + current/required count. Progress bar at bottom.
gameplay_screen.bottom_nav: Row of Secondary/Nav buttons: Board, Map, Town, Retry, Settings

elements: Info Panel (Parchment Card) on node click with 'Start Level' button
Parchment Cards representing: Rune Words, Capsule Clash, Shop, Upgrades
Include Mascot image in one of the bento cells

settings_modal.layout: Absolute inset-0, flex center, bg-black/60 z-50

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, nodes, settings toggles) and key informational metrics (score, moves left, level goal, resources) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='play-button', data-testid='resource-gold-amount'.

media_urls.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these exact URLs for the corresponding visual elements. Do not use generic placeholders.

main_background.description: Cinematic twilight kingdom at the edge of an enchanted forest. Use for Title, Gameplay, Map backgrounds.
main_background.usage: Use as a full-bleed background object-cover inside the game container.

parchment_texture.usage: Use as background image with mix-blend-multiply on parchment panels and modals.

mascot_placeholder.description: Cute regal mystical owl/griffin on a parchment scroll.
mascot_placeholder.usage: Use on Title Screen and in the Town Hub bento grid.
